limitations: Ordinal likelihood and impact scores — not statistical probabilities.
Risk register supports governance triage, not regulatory attestation.

risks.risk_title: Dead WinINET localhost proxy blocks browser access
risks.risk_scenario: ProxyServer points to localhost port with no listener; browsers fail while ICMP may succeed.
risks.remediation_action: Preview proxy-disable with typed confirmation and rollback snapshot

risks.risk_title: Unknown localhost proxy listener without writer attribution
risks.risk_scenario: Listener present on proxy port; registry writer unknown without Sysmon E13.

risks.risk_title: TLS path mismatch — possible interception context
risks.risk_scenario: Proxied TLS chain differs from direct path; requires investigation with limitations.
risks.remediation_action: Document path delta; escalate with evidence tier — not confirmed MITM
limitations: POSSIBLE_MITM_RISK is triage — not confirmed interception.
